data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding due date and request lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the due date and request lifecycle (open/fulfilled/declined/expired). However, the evidence provided does not include any details about the due date or the lifecycle status of the requests. This lack of critical information leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction is absent.
gaps: No evidence of due date and request lifecycle status.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for due date and lifecycle status
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the due date and request lifecycle.
